title: Uncharted
description: This modpack is mostly biome mods and some other mods for traveling around the biomes!
body:
# Uncharted

This modpack is all about adventure! Dive into incredible new biomes, each with its own unique flair and challenges. From fall biomes to massive mountains, the world is your oyster.

But how do you get around all these amazing places? Fear not, explorer! This pack also includes a variety of travel-themed mods to help you conquer any terrain. Soar through the skies with a glider and defeat tuns of mobs with a katana!

Here's what you can expect:

- A smorgasbord of biomes: Discover countless new biomes, each offering a new feel to the game!
  
- Travel in style: Explore these diverse landscapes with the help of travel-oriented mods.
  
- Building bonanza: Let your creativity run wild with all the new resources and inspiration from
the different biomes, along with lots of new blocks from the chipped mod.
- Share your creations: Upload your awesome builds to discord and ask people what they think!
With this modpack, the only limit is your imagination. So, grab your pickaxe, pack your bags, and get ready to explore!
- Defeat The Dragon: Fight the updated and better ender with lots new weapons and
